title: polygonum bistorta subsp. carneum
intro: Polygonum bistorta subsp. carneum, also known as Alpine bistort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the knotweed family Polygonaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and inflammation. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Polygonum bistorta subsp. carneum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used externally to treat skin conditions and wounds.
